    "Lock applied without an accompanying tag",
    "Tag applied without an accompanying lock",
    "Isolation points are not fully secured in compliance with LOTO standards"

    "Stop all work in the affected zone immediately",
    "Verify energy isolation status at all points",
    "Apply matching locks and tags to all isolation points in accordance with the LOTO permit",
    "Verify zero energy state before resuming any work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.147, lockout and tagout devices must be used together unless a tagout-only system is specifically authorized and provides full employee protection. Having a lock without a tag, or a tag without a lock, violates standard safety sequences and permit-to-work requirements, creating a critical safety risk.",

    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(6)"
  ]
